text: Machine learning is a type of artificial intelligence where computers learn from data instead of following explicit instructions. One common approach is supervised learning. In this method, the computer is given training data, which consists of input examples along with their correct outputs. Using this data, the system builds a model that identifies patterns and relationships. Once the model is ready, it can make predictions about new, unseen data. For example, after training on many pictures of cats and dogs, the model can predict whether a new image shows a cat or a dog. The goal is to achieve high accuracy, meaning the model's predictions are correct most of the time.
